title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Godrej Properties

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Godrej Properties
jsonLd.description:
We at Godrej Properties are looking for an experienced Real Estate Agent based out of Agra. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Godrej Properties:
Godrej Properties is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Properties!
